title: Run synthesis/lint and report structural issues
description: Run synthesis or a linter and extract inferred latches, multi-driven nets, and unconstrained CDC with file locations.
body: Use when checking an RTL change for hardware-level defects. Actions: run the synthesis/lint flow (or Verilator --lint-only), parse the report for inferred latches, multi-driver nets, incomplete sensitivity, and unconstrained clock-domain crossings, and report each with file/line and severity. Do not treat lint warnings as cosmetic. This skill exposes capability only and must not invoke vendor synthesis without runtime permission. Validation signals include a clean lint summary. Risk boundary: inferred-latch, multi-driver, and CDC findings are blocking; recommend escalation rather than suppression.
